# REQ-FR-260015: Feature-Sliced Frontend Architecture and Rendering Model

- Class: FR
- Status: Accepted
- Date: 2026-04-17
- Source decision: G1, G3 (Architectural style and rendering strategy)

## Requirement

The frontend shall implement a feature-sliced modular architecture and use CSR-first rendering for the interactive workspace surface.

## Rationale

Feature slicing improves maintainability for evolving capabilities, while CSR-first rendering supports low-latency graph interactions.

## Scope Notes

- In scope for MVP: feature-oriented modules, CSR-first workspace runtime behavior.
- Out of scope for this requirement: micro-frontend decomposition and SSR-driven workspace rendering.

## Verification

- Architecture checks confirm feature module boundaries exist and are used.
- Runtime checks confirm interactive workspace flows run CSR-first.
- Regression checks confirm route/feature additions preserve feature-sliced structure.

## Traceability

- Related ADRs: ADR-260018
- Related backlog items: BI-260015
